Upload or Change Logo
Save the vendor profile first, then upload the logo from the dedicated logo manager.

Editing Notes

Small guidance to keep the vendor profile polished and consistent.

Use a real business name Keep the company name consistent with payout methods, invoices, and marketplace branding.
Assign a clear contact Add the primary representative so operations and finance teams know who owns vendor communication.
Write a concise overview Describe what the vendor sells and how they operate so internal teams can understand the business quickly.
